description: PLACEHOLDER — TF-Java static-graph reference for the vector-Nédélec sphere-PEC eigenmode pipeline (Epic #88 / #134). This file records the expected structural metadata only; the actual K_int / M_int matrix data are produced at CI time by running reference/tf_java/sphere_pec and comparing to reference/fixtures/sphere_pec/baseline.json. Regenerate with: cd reference/tf_java/sphere_pec && mvn -B -Plinux-x86_64 exec:java, then copy the emitted reduced_kM_sphere_pec.json here.
units: lambda = k^2 (inverse-length squared); dimensionless mesh coordinates

mesh_path.description: Path to the bundled Gmsh .msh fixture (reference/fixtures/sphere_pec/sphere.msh).

n_index.description: Refractive index inside the dielectric sphere; epsilon_r = n^2 = 2.25 inside.

n_int.description: Interior edge count (DOFs after PEC elimination). Should equal 3300 for the 774-node fixture.

n_nodes.description: Number of mesh nodes. Strict equality.

n_tets.description: Number of mesh tets. Strict equality.

n_edges.description: Total global edge count (before PEC elimination). Should equal 4512.

n_interior_edges.description: Interior edge count (DOFs after PEC elimination). Should equal 3300.

k_int_frobenius.description: Frobenius norm of K_int. Expected ~1093.85 (from NumPy baseline); tolerance 1e-3 relative.

m_int_frobenius.description: Frobenius norm of M_int. Expected ~9.7438 (from NumPy baseline); tolerance 1e-3 relative.

provenance.verified_against: reference/fixtures/sphere_pec/baseline.json — expected K_int Frobenius ~1093.85, M_int Frobenius ~9.74, physical eigenvalues [1.4195, 1.4204, 1.4207, 3.2719, 3.2775] to < 1e-5 relative
provenance.note: This is a placeholder fixture. The K_int / M_int matrix data are NOT embedded here (3300x3300 = 10.9M entries would be ~90MB JSON). The CI workflow runs the TF-Java assembly at test time and compares the emitted sidecar to baseline.json using eigensolve_sphere_pec_sidecar.py.
